Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetPageSettings method sets the page settings to use for the state buffer.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void SetPageSettings(uint32_t initialPageCount, bool allowDynamicResize = false);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The number of pages to allocate when the state buffer is created.
True to allow the page count to be increased after allocation, false to fix the page count at allocation time.
